title: US stocks are off to their worst start versus the global market since 1995
author: Sigma Capital

excerpt: U.S. stocks have had their worst start since 1995 compared to global markets. This trend is according to Goldman Sachs data. The current year shows the worst performance since 1995.

content.introduction: U.S. stocks have had their worst start since 1995 compared to global markets. This trend is according to Goldman Sachs data. The current year shows the worst performance since 1995.
body: U.S. stocks are off to their worst start of the year since 1995 against the global market, according to data from Goldman Sachs.
U.S. stocks are having their worst start since 1995, the same year Pixar's original Toy Story was released. Yahoo Finance Host Julie Hyman,
